audit_method: meta-device instantiation from the official config; no weights downloaded; parameter placement measured, not estimated from marketing size

model_identity_1.reason: bitsandbytes quantizes nn.Linear only; transformers 5.13.0 qwen3_5_moe stores ~93% of parameters in fused 3D expert tensors that remain BF16 under NF4 loading, reproducing the earlier Qwen3.6-35B-A3B audit

model_identity_2.reason: compressed-tensors is not installed in the approved stack; adding it is a new-dependency gate, and RTX 3090 (Ampere sm86) has no FP8 kernel path, so the loader would decompress toward the BF16 footprint
model_identity_2.gate_result: FAIL (installed loader cannot run it within the gate)

cpu_offload_note: BF16 with bounded CPU offload loads this geometry but was measured at ~5.3 minutes per prompt on this hardware in earlier milestones; the protocol allows offload only as a reported feasibility mode and the branched counterfactual screen would be infeasible
unblock_options_for_operator: approve installing compressed-tensors and accept a likely decompression/kernel failure on Ampere (low odds)
approve an explicit offload-feasibility-only scope with reduced branch budgets (very slow; changes the protocol)
approve a smaller official MoE research proxy with claims scoped to that proxy (model-family decision)
approve waiting for an official pre-quantized (GPTQ/AWQ-class) Agents-A1 checkpoint
privacy_check_status: aggregate feasibility numbers only; no paths/weights
